article.description: — Victor Wembanyama had 40 points and 15 rebounds in a highlight-reel return, helping the San Antonio Spurs spoil No. 1 overall pick Cooper Flagg's debut in a 125-92 rout of the Dallas Mavericks on Wednesday night.
article.headline: Wembanyama scores 40 as Spurs spoil Flagg debut with 125-92 rout of Mavericks

images.caption: Victor Wembanyama discusses 40-point performance in the Spurs' 125-92 victory over the Mavericks.
images.name: Wemby: 'I worked hard in the summer, it's paying off'

article.linkText: Wembanyama scores 40 as Spurs spoil Flagg debut with 125-92 rout of Mavericks
article.story: DALLAS -- — Victor Wembanyama had 40 points and 15 rebounds in a highlight-reel return, helping the San Antonio Spurs spoil No. 1 overall pick Cooper Flagg's debut in a 125-92 rout of the Dallas Mavericks on Wednesday night. Flagg, the second-youngest player to start in his NBA debut by two days behind LeBron James, didn't score until the first possession of the second half, finishing with 10 points and 10 rebounds. The 18-year-old from Duke had more trouble getting into the flow than the second overall choice. Dylan Harper came off the San Antonio bench midway through the first quarter, started the run that put the Spurs in control and scored 15 points. Reigning Rookie of the Year Stephon Castle scored 22 points for the Spurs. Anthony Davis had 22 points and 13 rebounds as the Mavericks await the return of star guard Kyrie Irving, who is likely months away from his season debut while recovering from ACL surgery. Wembanyama, who set a Spurs record for most points in a season opener, dominated the matchup of two of the three most recent top draft picks, with the 2023 No. 1 choice adding three blocks to several spectacular dunks and a couple of buckets with fouls that sent Davis and Dereck Lively II to the bench. The 7-foot-4 sensation was playing in the regular season for the first time since deep vein thrombosis, a blood clot condition in the shoulder, required surgery and ended his second season in February. Wembanyama keyed a 13-0 run late in the first half that put the Spurs in control. After Harper scored, the 2024 Rookie of the Year pump faked out of a double team and was fouled by Davis on the way to a reverse dunk. The next time down, he hit a jumper as Davis picked up his fourth foul. Up next Spurs: At New Orleans on Friday night. Mavericks: Washington on Friday as part of a five-game homestand. ------ AP NBA: https://apnews.com/hub/nba

images.caption: Victor Wembanyama (center left) and the San Antonio Spurs are favored entering the NBA Finals.
images.credit: Jesse D. Garrabrant/NBAE via Getty Images

images.alt: Jalen Brunson
images.caption: Jalen Brunson has the New York Knicks in the NBA Finals for the first time since 1999.

images.caption: The Knicks are looking to end the series against the Cavaliers tonight, as they have the second-shortest title odds and are an overwhelming favorite to win the East.

images.alt: Jalen Brunson
images.caption: The Knicks are now heavy favorites to win the Eastern Conference after taking a 3-0 series lead over the Cavs.
images.credit: Nathaniel S. Butler/NBAE via Getty Images
images.name: Jalen Brunson [608x342]

images.name: Luka Doncic [1296x729]

images.caption: LeBron James and the Lakers are on a roll as March winds down.
images.name: LeBron James  [1296x729]

images.alt: Victor Wembanyama #1 of the San Antonio Spurs handles the ball during the game against the Detroit Pistons on March 5, 2026 at the Frost Bank Center in San Antonio, Texas.
images.caption: Victor Wembanyama and the Spurs continue to see their championship odds shift.
images.name: Victor Wembanyama [1296x729]

images.alt: Jayson Tatum #0 of the Boston Celtics celebrates after scoring against the Dallas Mavericks during the second quarter at TD Garden on March 06, 2026 in Boston, Massachusetts.
images.caption: The Celtics' title odds have shortened since Jayson Tatum's return last week.
images.name: Jayson Tatum [1296x729]

images.alt: Victor Wembanyama #1 and Devin Vassell #24 of the San Antonio Spurs looks on during the game against the New Orleans Pelicans on January 25, 2026 at the Frost Bank Center in San Antonio, Texas.
images.caption: Led by Victor Wembanyama, the Spurs continue to see their NBA championship odds shorten.
images.name: Victor Wembanyama [1296x729]

images.name: Cade Cunningham [1296x729]

images.alt: Oklahoma City Thunder guard Shai Gilgeous-Alexander (2) against the Phoenix Suns in the first half at Mortgage Matchup Center.
images.caption: Even after a rough stretch of games, the Thunder remain the heavy favorites to win the NBA championship.
images.name: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander [1296x729]

images.alt: Cleveland Cavaliers guard Donovan Mitchell (45) against the Phoenix Suns in the first half at Mortgage Matchup Center.
images.caption: Adding James Harden to a talented roster with the likes of Donovan Mitchell gives the Cavs a higher upside this season.
images.name: Donovan Mitchell [1296x729]

images.alt: Jaylen Brown #7 of the Boston Celtics shoots against the Portland Trail Blazers at TD Garden on January 26, 2026 in Boston, Massachusetts.
images.caption: The Celtics now have shorter odds to win the NBA title than the Spurs, Rockets, Knicks and Pistons.
images.name: Jaylen Brown [1296x729]

images.alt: Jamal Murray #27 of the Denver Nuggets dribbles the ball during the game against the Dallas Mavericks on January 14, 2026 at American Airlines Center in Dallas, Texas.
images.caption: Jamal Murray has led the Nuggets while Nikola Jokic recovers from injury.
images.name: Jamal Murray  [1296x729]

images.alt: Victor Wembanyama #1 of the San Antonio Spurs looks on during the game against the Cleveland Cavaliers on December 29, 2025 at the Frost Bank Center in San Antonio, Texas.
images.caption: Victor Wembanyama and the Spurs have seen their odds to win the NBA championship shorten in the past week.
images.name: Victor Wembanyama [1296x729]

videos.description: San Antonio Spurs vs. Dallas Mavericks: Game Highlights
videos.headline: San Antonio Spurs vs. Dallas Mavericks: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (San Antonio Spurs vs. Dallas Mavericks: Game Highlights) 2025/10/23 ESHEET

videos.description: Victor Wembanyama powers the Spurs to a big opening win over the Mavericks with a 40-point night.
videos.headline: Wemby puts up 40 in must-see performance

tracking.trackingName: COM_NBA Highlight (Wemby puts up 40 in must-see performance) 2025/10/23 ESHEET

videos.description: 18-year-old Cooper Flagg is introduced in the Mavericks' starting lineup for the first time.
videos.headline: Cooper Flagg introduced in starting lineup for Mavs

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Cooper Flagg introduced in starting lineup for Mavs) 2025/10/23 ESHEET

videos.description: Cooper Flagg almost throws down a monster dunk, but Anthony Davis follows up on the miss.
videos.headline: Cooper Flagg almost throws down ridiculous slam on first NBA play

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Cooper Flagg almost throws down ridiculous slam on first NBA play) 2025/10/23 ESHEET

videos.description: Victor Wembanyama takes off for the incredible one-handed slam on the breakaway.
videos.headline: Victor Wembanyama throws down nasty slam

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Victor Wembanyama throws down nasty slam) 2025/10/23 ESHEET

videos.description: Luke Kornet is awarded a flagrant foul vs. the Mavericks.
videos.headline: Luke Kornet receives flagrant foul

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Luke Kornet receives flagrant foul) 2025/10/23 ESHEET

videos.description: D'Angelo Russell finds Anthony Davis with a beautiful bounce pass for two.
videos.headline: D'Angelo Russell dishes to AD for nice pivot shot

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (D’Angelo Russell dishes to AD for nice pivot shot) 2025/10/23 ESHEET

videos.description: Victor Wembanyama throws down a ridiculous jam over his defender down low.
videos.headline: Wemby throws down dunk off slick give-and-go

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Wemby throws down dunk off slick give-and-go) 2025/10/23 ESHEET

videos.description: Stephon Castle fights off defender for and-1
videos.headline: Stephon Castle fights off defender for and-1

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Stephon Castle fights off defender for and-1) 2025/10/23 ESHEET

videos.description: Victor Wembanyama makes this reverse alley-oop look too easy off the feed from Stephon Castle.
videos.headline: Castle finds Wemby for smooth-looking reverse alley-oop

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Castle finds Wemby for smooth-looking reverse alley-oop) 2025/10/23 ESHEET

videos.description: Victor Wembanyama shows off with a nasty reverse dunk plus the foul down low in the third quarter.
videos.headline: Wemby somehow throws down reverse jam plus and-1

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Wemby somehow throws down reverse jam plus and-1) 2025/10/23 ESHEET

videos.description: Devin Vassell somehow gets the and-1 to fall

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Devin Vassell somehow gets the and-1 to fall) 2025/10/23 ESHEET

videos.description: Anthony Davis picks up his fourth foul while trying to stop an inspired Victor Wembanyama.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play ('Are you entertained?! Wemby makes miraculous fadeaway jumper) 2025/10/23 ESHEET

videos.description: Cooper Flagg scores his first NBA points as a Maverick.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Cooper Flagg scores first career points) 2025/10/23 ESHEET

videos.description: Victor Wembanyama comes up with a massive block on one end then draws the foul while draining the 3-pointer on the other.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Wemby does it all on both ends of court) 2025/10/23 ESHEET

videos.description: Stephon Castle takes off after stealing the ball and deposits the easy layup.
